name: visio-diagram
description: Generate editable Microsoft Visio diagrams from text descriptions using script-only Visio COM automation.

interface.longDescription: Visio Diagram helps Codex convert architecture, network, topology, flow, and process descriptions into editable Microsoft Visio .vsdx files by generating a JSON diagram specification and running a bundled PowerShell script against Visio's COM automation API. It is a script-only workflow and does not rely on desktop UI automation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create an editable Visio .vsdx diagram from my architecture or flow description.
